typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Resource ID Name} as string,
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Spreadsheet Field} as string,
		period as string,
		units as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true) ~> srcP6UnitsOverTime
dcConvertNulltoDummyVal unpivot(output(
		period as string,
		units as string
	),
	ungroupBy({Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Resource ID Name},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Spreadsheet Field}),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> unpivotData
srcP6UnitsOverTime derive(each(match(!(in(['Activity ID','Activity Name','Resource ID Name','Start','Finish','Spreadsheet Field'],name))), $$ = iif(isNull($$) || !isDecimal($$), '-99', $$))) ~> dcConvertNulltoDummyVal
unpivotData filter(units != '-99') ~> FilterDummyRows
FilterDummyRows sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		{project code} as string,
		{from function} as string,
		{to function} as string,
		quantity as string,
		uom as string,
		{amount in USD} as string,
		comments as string
	),
	partitionFileNames:['p6_labor_stage.csv'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> sinkL3UnitsOverTime
